name: Daffodil Leopard Print Woven Rug - Threshold™
description:
Bring a bit of wild style to your indoor ensemble with this Animal Print Woven Rug from Threshold™. Complete with latex backing, this rectangular area rug is designed to feel soft under your feet while standing up to high-traffic areas in your home. Showcasing an allover animal print in neutral tones for a subtly stylish look, this woven area rug adds luxury and charm to your space while complementing any decor style.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
